root.sql:
select nvl(money_amount,0) - nvl(money_amount_not,0) - ppm_amout as unkeep_real /*คงค้าง*/ ,tab.* from ( select sc_kep_t_monthly_receive.membership_no ,pka_com_function.fp_get_member_name( sc_kep_t_monthly_receive.membership_no ) as member_name ,pka_com_function.fp_form( sc_kep_t_monthly_receive.member_group_no, 'XXX-XXX' ) as member_group_no ,sc_rep_kep_return_month.count_month ,sc_kep_t_monthly_receive.receive_month ,sc_kep_t_monthly_receive.seq_no ,sum(sc_kep_t_monthly_receive_det.money_amount) as money_amount /*ยอดเรียกเก็บ*/ ,sum(sc_kep_t_monthly_receive_det.money_amount_not) as money_amount_not /*ยอดที่เก็บได้*/ ,( select max( receipt_date ) from sc_com_m_receipt where receipt_mode = 'R' and receipt_status = '0' and month_receipt_no = sc_kep_t_monthly_receive.receipt_no ) as ppm_date /*ตามมาชำระ*/
,( select nvl( sum( recept_amount ) , 0 ) from sc_com_m_receipt where receipt_mode = 'R' and receipt_status = '0' and month_receipt_no = sc_kep_t_monthly_receive.receipt_no ) as ppm_amout /*ตามมาชำระ(บาท)*/
from sc_kep_t_monthly_receive_det ,sc_kep_t_monthly_receive ,sc_rep_kep_return_month where ( sc_kep_t_monthly_receive_det.membership_no = sc_kep_t_monthly_receive.membership_no ) and ( sc_kep_t_monthly_receive_det.receive_year = sc_kep_t_monthly_receive.receive_year ) and ( sc_kep_t_monthly_receive_det.receive_month = sc_kep_t_monthly_receive.receive_month ) and ( sc_kep_t_monthly_receive.seq_no = sc_kep_t_monthly_receive_det.seq_no ) and ( sc_kep_t_monthly_receive.membership_no = sc_rep_kep_return_month.membership_no ) and ( ( sc_kep_t_monthly_receive_det.money_amount > 0 ) AND ( sc_kep_t_monthly_receive.receipt_status = '2' ) ) --ยอดที่เก็บได้ น้อยกว่ายอดเรียกเก็บ สถานะ 2 ไม่ได้แปลว่าเก็บไม่ได้เสมอไป เคส ดอกเบี้ยสัญญาเก่า น้อยกว่า ดอกเบี้ยสัญญาใหม่ and sc_kep_t_monthly_receive.kep_method_amount < PKA_KEP_MAGENT.fp_get_agent_amount_seq( sc_kep_t_monthly_receive.membership_no , sc_kep_t_monthly_receive.receive_year , sc_kep_t_monthly_receive.receive_month , sc_kep_t_monthly_receive.seq_no ) and sc_rep_kep_return_month.rep_type = 'REP' /*WHERE*/ -- and sc_kep_t_monthly_receive.receipt_effectdate between '31/08/2020' and '31/08/2020' --and sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_type between '13' and '14' -- and sc_kep_t_monthly_receive.receive_year = 2020 -- and sc_kep_t_monthly_receive.receive_month = 8 -- and sc_kep_t_monthly_receive.membership_no = '059120' group by sc_kep_t_monthly_receive.membership_no ,sc_kep_t_monthly_receive.receive_month ,sc_kep_t_monthly_receive.seq_no ,sc_kep_t_monthly_receive.receipt_no ,sc_kep_t_monthly_receive.member_group_no ,sc_rep_kep_return_month.count_month order by sc_kep_t_monthly_receive.member_group_no ,sc_kep_t_monthly_receive.membership_no )tab

r_ktm_backward_installment_3_nest_coll.sql: SELECT pka_com_function.fp_form( pka_com_function.fp_get_member_group( sc_lon_m_contract_coll.ref_own_no ) ,'XXX-XXX' ) as coll_group_no ,sc_lon_m_contract_coll.ref_own_no ,sc_lon_m_contract_coll.collateral_description FROM sc_lon_m_loan_card, sc_lon_m_contract_coll ,sc_lon_m_contract WHERE ( sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_contract_no = sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no ) AND ( sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no = sc_lon_m_contract_coll.loan_contract_no ) AND ( sc_lon_m_contract_coll.status = '0' ) AND ( sc_lon_m_contract.membership_no = {0} ) AND ( sc_lon_m_loan_card.principal_balance > 0 ) /*WHERE*/ ORDER BY sc_lon_m_contract_coll.collateral_no
